testcase.name: Client: Global Logout › Global logout destroys __sso_session cookie
Client: Global Logout › User redirected to login after global logout

failure.message: global-logout.spec.ts:39:7 User redirected to login after global logout

testcase.name: Client: Global Logout › All clients require re-login after global logout

failure.message: global-logout.spec.ts:50:7 All clients require re-login after global logout

testcase.name: Client: Global Logout › Cannot use stale tokens after global logout

failure.message: global-logout.spec.ts:72:7 Cannot use stale tokens after global logout

testcase.name: Client: Global Logout › After global logout, login creates fresh session

failure.message: global-logout.spec.ts:94:7 After global logout, login creates fresh session
